sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Why BTIG cut its target on Humacyte (HUMA) but kept a bullish view on the bigger opportunity
feed.summary: The article discusses why BTIG lowered its price target on Humacyte (HUMA) but maintained a bullish outlook due to significant long-term potential. The report likely details the reasons for the target adjustment, such as short-term challenges or market conditions, while emphasizing the company's underlying value and future growth prospects.

feed.title: BofA Securities initiates HubSpot stock coverage with buy rating
feed.summary: BofA Securities initiated coverage on HubSpot Inc (NYSE:HUBS) with a Buy rating and a $300.00 price target, seeing the current price as an attractive entry point. Analyst Matt Bullock anticipates HubSpot will reaccelerate growth to 20% this year, despite a 71% drop in shares from 2025 highs and concerns about AI disruption. The company boasts impressive gross profit margins of 84%, and 22 analysts have recently increased earnings estimates.

feed.title: Amazon Leo to power in-flight Wi-Fi for Delta Air Lines starting in 2028
feed.summary: Amazon Leo and Delta Air Lines have announced a multi-year agreement to bring high-speed, low-latency in-flight Wi-Fi to hundreds of Delta aircraft, beginning in 2028. This partnership will enhance the travel experience for millions of Delta passengers, offering free Wi-Fi for SkyMiles members and leveraging Amazon's advanced satellite technology. The collaboration builds on Delta's existing relationship with AWS, integrating various Amazon technologies to improve the overall customer journey.

feed.title: Advisers get global stock exposure on U.S. exchanges in MSCI deal
feed.summary: Syntax Data and MSCI Inc. have partnered to offer a range of MSCI's global ADR indexes on the Syntax Direct platform, enabling financial advisers to build customized international portfolios on U.S. exchanges. This collaboration aims to democratize global market access for advisers and their clients by providing diversified international equity exposure through American Depositary Receipts (ADRs). The partnership will also help MSCI expand into the independent Registered Investment Adviser (RIA) channel, enhancing wealth management distribution.

feed.title: Royal Fund Management LLC Has $5.58 Million Position in Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG

feed.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Adobe's and Microsoft
feed.summary: Zacks Investment Ideas highlights Adobe (ADBE) and Microsoft (MSFT) as great tech stocks to buy, noting both are trading at historically low forward earnings multiples despite recent market sell-offs driven by AI concerns. The article suggests these established tech titans, while impacted by AI advancements and spending, offer significant upside potential for long-term investors. Both companies have integrated AI into their offerings and continue to demonstrate strong revenue and earnings growth.

feed.title: Royal Fund Management LLC Boosts Stock Position in U.S. Bancorp $USB

The bank also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $59.52.

feed.title: Amazon Leo
feed.summary: Delta and Amazon are collaborating on a long-term partnership to enhance travel experiences through technology. Delta will integrate Amazon Leo onto hundreds of its aircraft starting in 2028, initially with 500 planes. This initiative aims to expand Delta's Sync Wi-Fi and seatback entertainment, offering more personalized connections for customers and extending the airline's technological capabilities.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb expands multiple myeloma care program after decade
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb is expanding its "Standing in the Gap" program to address care disparities for multiple myeloma patients in underserved communities. The company is conducting a large survey of over 1,000 patients, caregivers, and healthcare providers to identify care gaps. Since its 2016 launch, the program has reached 5,000 attendees and built a digital community of nearly 60,000, initially focusing on African Americans with multiple myeloma.

feed.title: Bunge Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG) will report its first-quarter 2026 earnings on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, before market open. The company will also host a conference call at 7 a.m. Central Time to discuss the results, with access provided via webcast and dial-in numbers. A replay of the call will be available until May 29, 2026.

feed.title: Apple at 50: a visual history
feed.summary: This article provides a visual history of Apple Inc. on its 50th anniversary, showcasing its evolution from a rebellious startup to a global technology giant. It features a collection of historical images illustrating key products, moments, and cultural impacts, from early Apple computers and Steve Jobs' appearances to the launch of the iPhone and the Vision Pro headset. The piece highlights the company's journey through various iconic products and events that have shaped its influence on technology and culture.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Evolves and Expands Standing in the Gaap to Advance More Equitable Care in Multiple Myeloma as Program Marks Ten Years
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) has announced the evolution of its "Standing in the Gaap" program, which aims to address disparities in multiple myeloma care in underserved communities, now marking its tenth year. A key part of this evolution is the launch of a large-scale U.S. survey involving over 1,000 patients, caregivers, and healthcare providers to better understand care gaps, developed with input from leading patient advocacy groups. This initiative reinforces BMS's commitment to equitable access, education, and community-driven solutions for multiple myeloma patients.

feed.title: Palo Alto CEO Nikesh Arora Warns OpenAI, Anthropic Models Could Boost Cyberattacks Within Six Months— 'Th
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks CEO Nikesh Arora warns that advanced AI models from OpenAI and Anthropic could significantly increase cyberattacks within six months by lowering the barrier for sophisticated threats. He emphasizes that these AI models, easily accessible, could enable individuals to conduct campaigns previously requiring teams and exploit vulnerabilities faster than companies can detect them. Arora advocates for using AI to combat AI threats, stressing the need for responsible AI development and swift defensive leveraging of these capabilities.

feed.title: FactSet (NYSE: FDS) lifts 2026 outlook after Q2 revenue growth and higher free cash flow
feed.summary: FactSet (NYSE: FDS) reported strong Q2 fiscal 2026 results with GAAP revenues up 7.1% to $611.0 million and organic revenues growing 6.8%. Despite a slight decline in GAAP diluted EPS, adjusted diluted EPS increased by 4.2%, and free cash flow rose significantly by 23.6%. The company raised its fiscal 2026 guidance for organic ASV, revenue, and adjusted diluted EPS, driven by sustained demand and increasing contributions from AI initiatives.

feed.title: Quanta to outline strategy and long-term targets at Investor Day
feed.summary: Quanta Services (NYSE: PWR) will host its 2026 Investor Day in New York City on March 31, 2026, where management will provide a strategic update and new long-term financial targets. The event, which includes a Q&A session, is scheduled from 9:00 a.m. to 11:30 a.m. ET and will be webcast live. Investors can expect presentation materials and a replay to be available on the company's Investor Relations website following the event.

feed.title: Invest Green Acquisition (NASDAQ: IGAC) outlines SPAC capital, trust and deadline
feed.summary: Invest Green Acquisition Corporation (IGAC), a blank check company, has detailed its financial structure, including the $172.5 million raised through its IPO and an additional $4.35 million from a private placement, leading to $176.85 million being placed in a trust account. The company aims to complete a business combination in the renewable energy, sustainable finance, or nuclear energy sectors by November 26, 2027, with $165.6 million initially available for this purpose after deferred underwriting fees. IGAC is classified as an emerging growth company and a smaller reporting company, allowing for reduced disclosure requirements, and public shareholders have redemption rights with limitations.

feed.title: Pentair says its water systems helped avoid 40 billion plastic bottles
feed.summary: Pentair plc released its 2025 Sustainability Report, highlighting significant achievements in water stewardship and product design for sustainability. The company met its water stewardship goals by restoring 100% of water withdrawal in high-stress areas and reducing operational water withdrawal by 34.4% from its 2019 baseline. Furthermore, Pentair's residential water filtration systems helped customers avoid 40 billion single-use plastic water bottles since 2021, and its energy-efficient pool products are projected to prevent 450,000 metric tons of CO2e emissions.

feed.title: SLB OneSubsea forging ahead with 2026 plans amid Middle East volatility

This update comes as part of SLB OneSubsea's ongoing activities, indicating a continued focus on its strategic objectives.

feed.title: AT&T rolls wireless and home internet into one monthly bill
feed.summary: AT&T has launched OneConnect, a new subscription service that combines unlimited wireless and home internet into a single monthly bill, including taxes and fees. This move targets customer preference for simplified billing and leverages AT&T's extensive wireless and fiber networks. The company reiterated its 2026 financial guidance and capital return plans, indicating no change due to this new offering.

feed.title: McCormick (NYSE: MKC) posts strong Q1 2026 growth and reaffirms full-year outlook

The company reaffirmed its full-year 2026 outlook, projecting net sales growth of 13%–17% and adjusted EPS of $3.05–$3.13, underscoring confidence in its growth initiatives and cost-saving programs.
